     "author": "therno",

   },
+  {
+    "quote": "After years of AI hype, I thought nothing could faze me. Then I installed @clawdbot. From nervous 'hi what can you do?' to full throttle - design, code review, taxes, PM, content pipelines... AI as teammate, not tool. The endgame of digital employees is here.",
+    "author": "lycfyi",
+    "url": "https://x.com/lycfyi/status/2014513697557758002"
+  },
   {
     "quote": "Just shipped my first personal AI assistant. On WhatsApp. Builds my second brain while I chat. Memory moves across agents (Codex, Cursor, Manus, etc.) And a lot more skills still to plug in. Personal AI is getting real with @steipete's @clawdbot.",
     "author": "christinetyip",
